package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerLazyLoadingEagerTemplateParseForUnusedRoutes() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_lazy_loading_eager_template_parse_for_unused_routes"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Lazy loading. Flag parsing templates for routes that may never be served in the current process mode."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
